caption_text:
Here ya go, MJ! (Mary Jane)

Here is my Texas Style Trash Chicken Nuggie Nachos! 

Homemade tortilla chips, chicken nuggets (freebies), Whataburger sauce, G’s nacho cheese, peach salsa, sour cream, avocado....

#dowhatyoucanwithwhatyouhave

#gkbeachkitchen #gktestkitchen #foodie #foodiegirl

Not the greatest photo...but this #buffalo #chicken #flatbread was #phenominal 🤤 Garlic Naan flatbread...top with butter and hot sauce...then grilled chicken...top with mozzarella and blue cheese. Bake for 7 minutes (to melt the cheese). Remove from oven, squeeze ranch on top, and sprinkle green onions. #holyyum #whatsfordinner #gktestkitchen #gkbeachkitchen #foodie #foodiegirl #setxfoodie #setxfoodiegirl #texasfoodie

When you get started on dinner kinda late. And you use what is in your fridge. And it is the BEST #bbq #chicken #pizza you’ve ever made (or have had!) #whatsfordinner #flatbread #foodie #foodiegirl #gkbeachkitchen #gktestkitchen

I am so in l❤️VE with my new #NuWave #airfryer ! I used to make a beer butt chicken on the grill. Cool, but uses a LOT of propane to grill for an hour. I’m not exactly how long this chicken cooked, but I used a #probe for the first time, and it shut off automatically when it hit 165° (that I pre-programmed). I also made a #BAS to go with it, and made #sweetpotato #chips.  Dude- if you have never had #sweetandspicy sweet potato chips in your salad- have you ever really had an AMAZING salad?!? #Ithinknot I also threw on some tomato, avocado, and #mango. You know you want to try it! #justdoit #gktestkitchen #gkbeachkitchen

Monday’s are for #rebalancing. I was gonna have a #BAS...but then I was at the store getting groceries, and I saw these portobello mushrooms and I was hooked. I haven’t had them in FOREVER. And I wasn’t super hungry, but I knew I needed something #good and #healthy and #nourishing so I made a plan. And it came together beautifully! #caprese #portobellomushroom #airfryer #whatsfordinner #gktestkitchen #gkbeachkitchen #foodie #foodiegirl #setxfoodiegirl

Another night...another air fryer meal! Lol well, partially. Made the hubby a ribeye and homemade French fries in the AF. People are correct- the steak is so freaking #JUICY! As for my meal- my only AF thing was the chicken meatballs. Heated them up from frozen. BUT! I made homemade marinara. And it. Was. Awesome! I’m sold. #foodie #foodiegirl #setxfoodiegirl #gkbeachkitchen #marinara #homemade #chicken #meatballs

Oh Em Gee. 

It’s #tacotuesday 🌮 

It’s also a new year. 

That means all new tacos! 

Carmelized bbq pulled pork tacos with mango salsa and sriracha lime crema. 

I mean...🤷🏻‍♀️ #gktestkitchen #gkbeachkitchen #setxfoodie #foodiegirl #setxfoodiegirl #clean
New year- time to get back to eating well! #tacotuesday🌮 #steak #tacos #mango #salsa #gkbeachkitchen
Wake up and have an awesome day! #blessedtolivehere #ilovemybeach #crystalbeach #texas #beachgirl #beachlife #goodmorning
